description_long: This is a two-story brick convenience store named 'Greenways Convenience Store', featuring a flat black roof and a prominent green storefront sign. The front facade has large rectangular windows on both floors, with the ground floor including a main entrance and additional display windows. The side and rear walls are mostly plain brick, with the rear featuring a small extension with a sloped roof and a metal door. The building sits on a paved area, with a small walled section at the back, possibly for deliveries or storage. The overall design is utilitarian, with minimal decorative elements and a focus on functionality typical of urban commercial buildings.
description: A two-story brick convenience store with a flat black roof, large front windows, and a green storefront sign reading 'Greenways Convenience Store'. The building features a rear extension and a simple, functional urban design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large display windows, and the green 'Greenways Convenience Store' sign.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a plain brick wall and a glimpse of the rear walled area and extension.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the small extension with a sloped roof, metal door, and several smaller windows.
description_view_3: Right side view with a plain brick wall and two windows on the rear extension.
attribute_storefront_signage: A large, rectangular, green sign with white text reading 'Greenways Convenience Store' is mounted above the main entrance, spanning the width of the storefront. The sign is non-illuminated and flush-mounted.
attribute_display_windows: Large, clear glass display windows are present on the ground floor of the front facade, framed in white, allowing visibility into the store interior. No advertisements or displays are visible.
